concept: Unexpected Item in the Emotional Baggage Area
title: Unexpected Item in the Emotional Baggage Area Funny Self Checkout Shirt, Introvert Grocery Humor Tee, Overthinker Gift
description:
Because nothing says healthy coping skills like hearing a robot announce your inner life at full volume.

This tee turns the most cursed phrase in modern retail into the perfect self own: a little grocery store panic, a little millennial overstimulation, and a lot of 'I just came in for paper towels and left with an existential spiral.' It is made for people who prefer self checkout, resent self checkout, and somehow keep choosing self checkout anyway.

Perfect for:
- introverts who treat every errand like a stealth mission
- overthinkers, anxious icons, and emotionally overpacked adults
- grocery goblins, retail therapy regulars, and anyone who feels personally attacked by automated voices
- friends, coworkers, burnt out parents, and chaos gremlins with a sense of humor

DETAILS:
- Fit: easy everyday tshirt energy with a relaxed, throw it on and go vibe
- Two print variants: dark ink artwork for light shirts and bright saturated artwork for dark shirts so the joke hits on any color
- What is on the shirt: bold self checkout style typography reading 'Unexpected Item in the Emotional Baggage Area' with a minimalist kiosk screen, tiny shopping basket icon, barcode accents, and subtle warning graphics
- Made to order: printed just for you when your cart says proceed to checkout

Equal parts retail satire and emotional support uniform, this is the shirt for anyone carrying groceries, receipts, and approximately nine invisible problems.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
